liveBroadcastRoom.upcomingMessage: This session has not started yet. You can go live when the scheduled time arrives.
liveBroadcastRoom.liveReadyMessage: The session is live. Start broadcasting from here — students can join from the app.
liveBroadcastRoom.liveViewerMessage: The session is live. Waiting for the host to start broadcasting.
liveBroadcastRoom.endedWithoutRecording: This session has ended. The recording is not available yet.

errors.hostToken: Could not load broadcast credentials. Check your permissions and try again.
